THE EPOCH INSTITUTE

Understanding civilizational patterns to illuminate the present.

The Epoch Institute researches human civilization with objectivity and curiosity — studying the rise and fall of empires, examining the real-time implications of historical events, and tracing how the past shapes modern society. We make the story of humanity not just informative, but compelling. History is not a closed book; it is the foundation of everything around us.

Interactive Explorer

The Rise & Fall of Empires

Ninety civilizations. Five millennia. Each trajectory scaled to its own peak — so you can compare not absolute size, but the shape of a civilization's story. Use the controls below to filter by region, era, or search for a specific empire.
